item.title: Changelog page
item.intent: /changelog must show dated entries of what shipped, published, or changed — lightweight and low-effort to maintain. Visitors and Simon must be able to see site evolution at a glance.
item.description: A simple reverse-chronological changelog page. Can use a content collection or a data file — keep it minimal so adding entries is low-friction. Each entry: date, short description, optional link.
steps: Create a changelog data source — either a content collection in src/content/changelog/ or a simple JSON/YAML data file
Create src/pages/changelog.astro using Base layout, rendering entries in reverse chronological order
Seed with 3-5 initial entries reflecting completed sprints (about page, series pages, products pages, etc.)
Each entry: date, description, optional link to the relevant page
